message:
feat(rch): add SpeedScore API types and CLI tests

Adds supporting types for SpeedScore CLI commands:
- SpeedScoreViewFromApi with rating() method
- SpeedScoreResponseFromApi for single worker queries
- SpeedScoreHistoryResponseFromApi for history queries
- SpeedScoreListResponseFromApi for all workers query

Adds CLI parsing tests for rch speedscore command:
- Single worker query (rch speedscore css)
- All workers query (rch speedscore --all)
- Verbose mode (rch speedscore css --verbose)
- History mode (rch speedscore css --history --days 7)
- Short verbose flag (rch speedscore css -v)

Related to bead remote_compilation_helper-vkc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
